narration: Science has a clearer story about the forgetting curve than social media ever will.

narration: The forgetting curve shows how quickly we lose information over time.
visual_description: Context visual: The forgetting curve shows how quickly we lose information over time.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: The forgetting curve shows how quickly we lose information over time.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: The forgetting curve shows how quickly we lose information over time.

narration: After just 20 minutes, we forget 40% of what we learn. Surprised?
visual_description: Escalation visual: After just 20 minutes, we forget 40% of what we learn. Surprised?
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: After just 20 minutes, we forget 40% of what we learn. Surprised?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: After just 20 minutes, we forget 40% of what we learn. Surprised?

narration: This was discovered by Hermann Ebbinghaus in the 1880s, revealing our brain's limits.
visual_description: Evidence visual: This was discovered by Hermann Ebbinghaus in the 1880s, revealing our brain's limits.
